casepack.title: Clinical Neuroscience — 3 Consciousness States (Tier-2)
casepack.description: Clinical neuroscience domain closure demonstrating GCD kernel applied to 3 consciousness states. 10-channel trace (4 cortical + 2 structural + 2 metabolic + 2 systemic) with equal weights. Healthy waking, deep coma, and psychedelic states classified through frozen regime gates.

run_intent.notes: Exercises the clinical neuroscience closure with 3 states: healthy waking (highest F, Watch regime — S exceeds Stable gate), deep coma (critical Collapse — all channels degraded, IC < 0.30), psychedelic (Collapse — omega just crosses 0.30 threshold). Demonstrates that 'healthy' does not automatically mean 'Stable' — the regime is derived from gates, never asserted.
